film.title: Peep World
film.overview: On the day of their Father's 70th birthday party, four siblings come to terms with the publication of a novel written by the youngest sibling, that exposes the family's most intimate secrets.

dialogues.dialogue: And you stop laughing. It's not funny.  I want to tell you something, Nate.  I want you to be proud of yourself.  When you're successful,  there are always people who will tear you down.
